title: // Allow skipping comment is stale after nie-cs0.6 prompt change
description: try_load_wallet_fvks contains '// Allow skipping: empty passphrase on non-no_passphrase path means user hit Enter.' The prompt was changed by nie-cs0.6 to 'leave blank to disable payment address generation' — it no longer says 'Enter to skip'. The comment's 'means user hit Enter' is now describing what Enter does (submits empty string) rather than the intended user action the prompt describes. A future reader sees mismatched explanations. Fix: update comment to '// Empty passphrase means user left the field blank — wallet will be unavailable for this session.'
